/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/KotekWatch.dir/KotekWatch_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KotekWatch.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KotekWatch.dir/KotekWatch_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_qml.cpp.o -o KotekWatch  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.5.3 /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.5.3 /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.5.3 /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.5.3 /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.5.3 /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.5.3 /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.5.3 /usr/local/Qt-6.5.3/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.5.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
